en: Is your company based in Italy or does your company have any tax obligations in Italy, and therefore required to maintain a DURF certificate for tax compliance purposes?
If Not - Please select one of the options below:
The company is exclusively based and operates in a foreign country with no economic activities in Italy.
The company’s operations are covered by tax treaty exemptions between Italy and the country where it is resident.
Please provide your company's home country
DURF Application template\nContact Info for help on with DURF from Agenzia delle Entrate
If Yes - Please upload your current Documento Unico Di Regolarità Fiscale form
